heading: Construction
label: 5411 Construction
text: Nothing in this chapter shall be construed to limit or otherwise affect the authority of any consensus standards organization to establish, modify, or withdraw any standards and specifications under any other law or authority.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior was renumbered section 6 and is classified to .section 9 of Pub. L. 101–592section 5408 of this title
Amendments1999— struck out “in effect on ” after “law or authority”.Pub. L. 106–34November 16, 1990
